title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Man Infraconstruction - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Man Infraconstruction - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Man Infraconstruction. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Man Infraconstruction:
Man Infraconstruction is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Man Infraconstruction!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
